files.patch:
@@ -2,55 +2,56 @@ name: CI
 
 on:
   push:
-    branches: [ main ]
   pull_request:
 
 jobs:
-  build-and-test:
+  rust:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - name: Install Rust
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
-      - name: Install wasm target
-        run: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown
-      - name: Cache cargo
-        uses: actions/cache@v4
-        with:
-          path: |
-            ~/.cargo/registry
-            ~/.cargo/git
-            target
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
-      - name: Cargo check
-        run: cargo check --lib -p cmaes_wasm
-      - name: Cargo test (unit)
-        run: cargo test --lib -p cmaes_wasm
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+      - name: Format
+        run: cargo fmt -- --check
+      - name: Clippy
+        run: cargo clippy -- -D warnings
+      - name: Tests
+        run: cargo test --all-targets
 
-  web-demo:
+  wasm:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - name: Install Rust
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
-      - name: Install wasm target
-        run: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
       - name: Install wasm-pack
-        run: curl -sSf https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh | sh
-      - name: Build wasm (web target)
-        run: scripts/build-all.sh
-      - name: Install bun
-        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v1
+        run: npm install -g wasm-pack
+      - name: wasm-bindgen tests (firefox headless)
+        run: wasm-pack test --headless --firefox
+
+  node-smoke:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+      - run: npm ci
+      - name: Node smoke test
+        run: npm run test:node
+
+  e2e:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          bun-version: latest
-      - name: Install test tooling (Playwright + http-server)
-        run: |
-          bun add -d playwright@1.48.2 http-server@14.1.1
-          bunx playwright install chromium
-      - name: Serve and smoke-test with Playwright (Chromium headless)
-        env:
-          PORT: 4173
-        run: |
-          bunx http-server . -p $PORT >/tmp/http.log 2>&1 &
-          sleep 3
-          bunx playwright test --reporter=list --config=.github/workflows/playwright.config.cjs
+          node-version: '20'
+      - run: npm ci
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
+      - name: Build CSS
+        run: npm run build:css
+      - name: Playwright tests
+        run: npm run e2e
